comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Python**: EAFP anti-pattern - Using `next()` on generator without default value raises implicit `StopIteration`. Use LBYL: check if list has matching line first, or provide default to `next()`.

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Fixed: replaced next() with LBYL list check + assert

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-24 18:46 PST_

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Code Simplifier Review**: EAFP anti-pattern detected - `next()` without default value raises implicit StopIteration exception. Use LBYL: provide a default to `next()` or check the list first before calling it. See [dignified-python-core.md](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/blob/main/.claude/skills/dignified-python/dignified-python-core.md#the-cornerstone-lbyl-over-eafp) - LBYL over EAFP.

comments.body:
Fixed: replaced next() with LBYL list check + assert
